sys_metadata_link.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_vehicle_ma_0_vehicle"> <x_snc_vehicle_ma_0_vehicle action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <city>Chillicothe</city> <country>United States</country> <description>erat vestibulum sed magna at nunc commodo placerat praesent blandit nam nulla integer pede justo lacinia</description> <end_date>2026-02-17</end_date> <make>Kenworth</make> <model>T659</model> <pin>9731</pin> <start_date>2026-04-06</start_date> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-02-17 05:40:13</sys_created_on> <sys_id>499e8b26fd8b32107f44b9211467fe14</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-02-17 05:40:13</sys_updated_on> <vin>1HGCR6F56FA842824</vin> <year>2026</year> </x_snc_vehicle_ma_0_vehicle> </record_update>
